name: jig-privacy-audit
description: Privacy, zero-knowledge, and E2EE audit-support skills for scoped evidence collection and review.

interface.longDescription: Codex skills for scoped, evidence-focused privacy, zero-knowledge, client encryption, cryptographic architecture, metadata, telemetry, and remediation audit workflows.
defaultPrompt: Scope a privacy audit for this encrypted app
Audit whether encrypted fields cross the network in plaintext
Build a privacy field matrix for this app
Audit telemetry and crash logs for leakage
Build a privacy threat model for this app
